rec3_counterfactual.user_universe: Distinct USER_ID values in the Brief 2B fraud cohort: KYC-passed (max-priority user status = PASSED) AND at least one fraud-labelled row (IS_FRAUD = True) anywhere in the extract. Same count as brief2b.kyc_fraud_users.
rec3_counterfactual.per_user_row_set: All extract rows whose USER_ID equals that user AND the user is in the fraud cohort universe. Implemented as every transaction row for users in kyc_fraud_users — includes both fraud-labelled and legitimate-labelled rows for those users (not fraud-labelled rows only).
rec3_counterfactual.t_definition: T = number of rows in the per_user_row_set (every TYPE in the extract for that user while classified in this cohort).
rec3_counterfactual.p_card_payment: count(rows with TYPE = CARD_PAYMENT) / T — P2P is NOT included in this numerator or denominator.
rec3_counterfactual.rec3_rule_flagged_users: Count of user_universe members with user_flagged true.
rec3_counterfactual.rec3_rule_scope_fraud_txns: Count of fraud-labelled rows (IS_FRAUD True) among kycFraudFraudTxns whose USER_ID is flagged.
rec3_counterfactual.rec3_rule_scope_fraud_txns_fiat_gbp: Subset of those rows with a successful fiat→GBP conversion (same FX/crypto exclusions as overview fraud GBP).

actor_archetypes.per_user_row_set: Same as rec3_counterfactual.per_user_row_set (all cohort txns for the user).
actor_archetypes.p_type: For any TYPE string: count(rows with that TYPE) / T.
actor_archetypes.axis_topup_atm: p(TOPUP) + p(ATM) — summed channel shares, single scalar.
actor_archetypes.assignment: Form three candidates (topup_atm, bank_transfer, card_first) with scores = the three axis values above. Sort candidates by score descending. Let best = highest score, second = next. If best < 0.15 OR (best − second) < 0.04, assign archetype mixed. Otherwise assign the id of the highest-scoring candidate. (This is NOT a 50% dominance rule; it is a 15% floor on the winning composite score and a 4 percentage-point minimum lead on the 0–1 scale.)
actor_archetypes.fraud_txn_counts: After each user has an archetype id, fraud_txns per row counts only kycFraudFraudTxns (fraud-labelled rows in the cohort) grouped by that user's archetype.
